title: Hedyotis ramarowii

The classification of Hedyotis ramarowii places it within the genus Hedyotis, which is a group of flowering plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is further classified into the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants that includes many species of shrubs, trees, and herbs. The classification of Hedyotis ramarowii is an important tool for understanding its biology and ecology.
